metadata.website_type: industrial tarps and protective covers catalog

tasks.name: Add two 20x30 heavy-duty waterproof tarps under $150 to the cart
tasks.description: Search for a 20 ft x 30 ft heavy-duty waterproof tarp, filter results to items under $150 with 4+ star ratings, sort by price, and add 2 units of the cheapest matching tarp to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type "20x30 heavy duty waterproof tarp" into the search field.
Press Enter to run the search.
In the sidebar price filter, set the maximum price field to "150".
In the rating filter section, select the checkbox for "4 stars & up".
In the size filter section, select the option "20 ft x 30 ft".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results, then on the product page set the quantity to "2" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Choose the thickest 12x16 fire-retardant tarp under $120
tasks.description: Find 12 ft x 16 ft fire-retardant tarps priced under $120, compare the first two results' thickness (mil or oz), and add 1 unit of the thicker tarp to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over "Tarps by Feature" and click on "Fire Retardant Tarps".
In the size filter, select "12 ft x 16 ft".
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "120".
From the filtered list, Ctrl-click (or use the equivalent action) on the first two product titles to open each in a separate browser tab.
In each of the two product tabs, locate the thickness value in the specifications (for example, in mils or ounces per square yard) and note the value.
On the product page that shows the greater thickness value, set the quantity field to "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Select a mid-priced outdoor generator cover with free shipping and 4+ stars
tasks.description: Search for outdoor generator covers that fit at least 36" L x 24" W x 30" H, have free shipping and a 4+ star rating, then sort by price and add the middle-priced option among the three cheapest matching products to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type "outdoor generator cover" into the search field and press Enter.
In the usage or environment filter, select the option for "Outdoor".
In the size or dimensions filter, set the minimum length to "36", the minimum width to "24", and the minimum height to "30" (in inches).
In the shipping filter section, select the option "Free Shipping".
In the rating filter section, select "4 stars & up".
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Price: Low to High".
From the sorted list, identify the first three products and click on the second product card (the mid-priced of the three).
On that product's detail page, set the quantity to "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Build a bulk order of three different tarp types for a construction site
tasks.description: Add three different tarps to the cart: a clear poly 12x20 tarp under $80 (qty 5), a mesh 10x10 tarp between $40 and $70 (qty 3), and a canvas 8x12 tarp under $90 (qty 2).
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over "Tarps by Material" and click on "Clear Poly Tarps".
In the size filter, select "12 ft x 20 ft", then in the price filter set the maximum price to "80" and click on the first product in the filtered list.
On the clear poly tarp product page, set the quantity to "5" and click "Add to Cart".
Return to the main navigation, hover over "Tarps by Material" and click on "Mesh Tarps".
In the size filter, select "10 ft x 10 ft", then in the price filter set the minimum price to "40" and maximum price to "70", and click on the first product in the filtered list.
On the mesh tarp product page, set the quantity to "3" and click "Add to Cart".
Again in the main navigation, hover over "Tarps by Material" and click on "Canvas Tarps".

In the size filter select "8 ft x 12 ft", in the price filter set the maximum price to "90", click on any product that matches these filters, then on its detail page set the quantity to "2" and click "Add to Cart".

tasks.name: Save two UV-resistant tarps for later use in a favorites list
tasks.description: Find UV-resistant tarps sized 16x20 under $100 with ratings of at least 4.5 stars, then save the highest-rated and the cheapest matching tarps to the site's favorites or wishlist feature.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar and type "UV resistant tarp 16x20", then press Enter.
In the size filter, select "16 ft x 20 ft".
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "100".
In the rating filter, select "4.5 stars & up".
Open the sort dropdown and select "Rating: High to Low".
Click the favorites or wishlist icon (such as a heart symbol) on the first product in the sorted list to save the highest-rated tarp.
Change the sort dropdown to "Price: Low to High" and click the favorites or wishlist icon on the first product in the list to save the cheapest tarp that meets the filters.

tasks.name: Choose pallet covers with the lowest price per cover for 48x40 pallets
tasks.description: Within pallet covers for 48x40 pallets, compare packs of 25 and 50 covers, calculate which pack has the lower price per cover, and add one pack of that option to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on "Protective Covers" and then select the "Pallet Covers" subcategory.
In the pallet size filter, select "48 in x 40 in".
In the pack size filter, select options for packs of "25" and "50" covers.
Click on a product representing a pack of 25 covers and note the total price shown on the product page.
Navigate back to the pallet covers list and click on a product representing a pack of 50 covers and note the total price shown on that product page.
Determine which pack (25 or 50) has the lower price per individual cover based on the total prices and pack quantities.
On the product page for the better-value pack, set the quantity to "1" and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Configure and add a custom 18x24 blue vinyl tarp with grommets to the cart
tasks.description: Use the custom tarp builder to create an 18 ft x 24 ft vinyl tarp in blue color with grommets every 18 inches and reinforced corners, set quantity to 3, and add it to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on the "Custom Tarps" or "Build Your Tarp" section.
In the material dropdown, select "Vinyl 18 oz" (or the closest vinyl option).
In the size fields, enter a width of "18" feet and a length of "24" feet.
In the color selector, choose the color "Blue".
In the edge or finishing options, select "Hemmed edges with grommets every 18 inches".
In the corner options, select "Reinforced corners" or the closest available reinforcement option.
Set the quantity field to "3".
Click the button labeled "Add Custom Tarp to Cart" or equivalent to add this configuration to the cart.

tasks.name: Begin checkout and choose standard ground shipping for an order
tasks.description: Starting from the cart, proceed to checkout, enter a new shipping address in Atlanta, GA with ZIP 30301, and select the "Standard Ground (5–7 business days)" shipping method before the payment step.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage and click on the cart icon in the header.
On the cart page, click the "Proceed to Checkout" button.
On the checkout page, choose the option to "Ship to a new address" if available.
In the name field for shipping, type "Alex Carter".
In the street address field, enter "1500 Industrial Way".
In the city field, type "Atlanta".
In the state or region dropdown, select "Georgia".
In the ZIP or postal code field, enter "30301".
In the shipping methods section, select the option labeled "Standard Ground (5–7 business days)".
Click the button labeled "Continue to Payment" or equivalent to proceed to the next step without entering any payment information.

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Tarp or protective cover available for browsing and purchase

fields.name: width_ft
fields.description: Finished width in feet for flat tarps

fields.name: length_ft
fields.description: Finished length in feet for flat tarps

fields.name: size_label
fields.description: Human-readable size like '20 ft x 30 ft'

fields.name: thickness_value
fields.description: Thickness numeric value

fields.name: thickness_unit
fields.description: Unit for thickness (mils or ounces per square yard)

fields.name: usage_environment
fields.description: Intended usage environment for items like generator covers

fields.name: interior_length_in
fields.description: Interior length capacity in inches (for covers)

fields.name: interior_width_in
fields.description: Interior width capacity in inches (for covers)

fields.name: interior_height_in
fields.description: Interior height capacity in inches (for covers)

fields.name: pallet_length_in
fields.description: Compatible pallet length in inches for pallet covers

fields.name: pallet_width_in
fields.description: Compatible pallet width in inches for pallet covers

fields.name: pack_quantity
fields.description: Number of covers per pack (e.g., 25 or 50 for pallet covers)

fields.name: price
fields.description: Price for the unit or pack

fields.name: average_rating
fields.description: Average star rating (0–5)

fields.name: rating_count
fields.description: Number of ratings used to compute average

entities.name: Category
entities.description: Product category used for navigation and catalog filtering

entities.name: ProductCategory
entities.description: Join entity mapping products to one or more categories

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart (single active cart for the agent)

fields.name: items
fields.description: Optional array of cart item IDs or embedded cart item objects

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Individual line item within the cart, for standard or custom products

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Used when item_type = standard_product

fields.name: custom_tarp_config_id
fields.description: Used when item_type = custom_tarp

fields.name: unit_price
fields.description: Price per unit at time added

entities.name: Favorite
entities.description: Products saved to the single-user favorites / wishlist list

entities.name: CustomTarpConfiguration
entities.description: Configuration created via the custom tarp builder

fields.name: grommet_spacing_in
fields.description: Spacing between grommets in inches

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Human-readable description for cart and checkout

entities.name: ShippingMethod
entities.description: Available shipping options shown at checkout

entities.name: CheckoutSession
entities.description: Represents an in-progress checkout, tying together cart, shipping address, and shipping method
